prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young South Asian man sitting beside a large apartment window during golden-hour sunset. He faces the camera in a relaxed seated pose, framed from mid-torso up, with thick voluminous dark hair, defined eyebrows, warm brown eyes, medium tan skin, and light stubble with a short trimmed beard and mustache. He wears a retro FC Barcelona football jersey with dark navy and burgundy vertical panels, a yellow Nike swoosh, the Barcelona crest, and the sponsor text “QATAR AIRWAYS” across the chest; use retro FC Barcelona Qatar Airways jersey as the key outfit. Warm golden sunlight streams through the window from the left, creating soft haze, rim light on the hair and cheek, and visible rainbow lens flares across the jersey and lower-left foreground. The apartment interior is softly blurred in the background, with sheer curtains glowing in the sun, a city skyline visible through the glass, and two out-of-focus party guests on the right: one young man holding a beer bottle and one partially visible woman with long dark hair. Use shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, filmic color grading, warm amber highlights, realistic window reflections, subtle grain, and a candid editorial photography feel. Keep the composition vertical, intimate, and cinematic, with the subject’s face sharply focused and centered slightly right of the window. Avoid cartoon styling, plastic skin, extra text, distorted logos, warped hands, or unrealistic lighting.
